description_long: This is a weathered glass bottle standing upright on a rough, irregular patch of ground. The bottle is dark brown with patches of white residue and dirt, suggesting it has been exposed to the elements for some time. Its cylindrical body tapers slightly toward the neck, which is capped with a narrow opening. The surface of the bottle is mottled and appears to have accumulated grime, possibly from being discarded outdoors. The surrounding ground is uneven, with a mix of earthy tones and scattered debris, further emphasizing the bottle's neglected state. No visible labels or branding can be seen on the bottle, and the cap area appears to be open or missing.
description: A dirty, dark brown glass bottle with white residue, standing on a rough, debris-strewn patch of ground.
description_view_0: The bottle is upright and clearly visible, showing its cylindrical shape and mottled, dirty surface.
description_view_1: The bottle is seen from a lower angle, highlighting its height and the uneven ground around it.
description_view_2: The bottle's side is more prominent, with the white residue and grime on its surface clearly visible.
description_view_3: A top-down view reveals the bottle's position in the center of a rough, irregular patch of ground.
